Short CV

Büşra Ecem Kumru was born in Istanbul, 1991. She graduated from Acıbadem University, Department of Nursing in 2014. She started her master’s degree in Acıbadem University, Department of Surgical Nursing in 2014 and transferred to the Department of Intensive Care Nursing in 2015. She currently continues to her master’s program.
